subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi
Are you in Florida the week of December 6th?
Soho House have a series of events around Art Basel
Are you interested in attending?

Did you ever meet with the person I suggested

Hope all is well ,
D M,
Sent via BlackBerry from T-Mobile  
David Mitchell
